conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
purpose: Revise the blocked H-A2 top2 2022 H2 stress purchase into a narrower one-month stress pull that can answer a named high-VIX regime gap while staying below the current $125 cost guard.

selection_reason.ranking_policy: descending by high30 days, then high25 days, then average VIX, then max VIX

allowed_actions: Download only the approved 2022-10 OPRA cbbo-1m daily-union requests using the locked cost report.
Reuse cache for any already-present files instead of re-downloading.
After download, rerun paid-cost audit and update the working cost basis with the committed estimate until provider actual usage is supplied.
Import/normalize the 2022-10 stress data and rerun H-A2 diagnostics only if required SPY bars and option quotes are present.
forbidden_actions: Do not download 2022-09 under this decision.
Do not download the original top2 bundle under this decision.
Do not download top3 or broad 2022 H2 calendar data under this decision.
Do not introduce a new paid provider under this decision.
Do not make an E2 acceptance, paper-trading, or live-trading claim from this purchase decision.
Do not run live LLM research from this decision.
post_download_requirements: Check whether 2022-10 SPY underlying bars exist; if missing, estimate their cost separately before any additional download.
Run the relevant import/normalization path for 2022-10 option quotes.
Treat any result as E1 unless MinTRL/PSR, DSR/search-log, implementable PnL, big-day dependency, and regime coverage gates pass.
